title: helenium litorale
intro: Helenium litorale, also known as coastal false sunflower, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. Its health benefits include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Helenium litorale can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
